DIOR 24 knee-high boots, part of the autumn/winter collection, are inspired by elegance and sophistication of the 1960s. Crafted meticulously from black patent calfskin leather and leather-effect stretch fabric, the boots feature gold-tone studs of various sizes on the upper, continuing the classic design of Mary Jane shoes. Decorative straps adorned with gold-tone CD logo metal beads are inspired by the iconic Dior Tribales earrings. ✔️Material: Stretch lambskin + patent leather ✔️Sole: Italian leather sole ✔️Sizes: 35-39 (Custom size 40 not eligible for return or exchange)
